description: Bright & spacious 2-storey end-unit townhome in prestigious Highland Park! This beautifully  3 bed, 3 bath home features hardwood flooring on the main, 9’ ceilings and large windows for abundant natural light, and a cozy gas fireplace. Chef-inspired kitchen with granite counters, high-end stainless steel appliances, gas range, and breakfast bar. Enjoy a fully fenced private patio with gas BBQ hookup—perfect for entertaining. Generous primary bedroom offers a walk-in closet and spa-inspired ensuite. Resort-style amenities include pool, hot tub, gym, yoga studio, indoor hockey rink, theatre & clubhouse. Steps to top schools, Morgan Crossing, Grandview Corners, shopping & dining.
